title: Notice variant scope follow-up
summary: The route-complete feedback pass needs one narrow follow-up so the new filed-route badge stays limited to route-backed notebook notices. Generic recorded completions like Forest Survey should keep the default notice styling.

execution_order.goal: Narrow the filed-route notice variant back to route-backed completions only.
execution_order.why_now: The current helper leaks the route badge onto generic recorded notices such as Forest Survey.

execution_order.goal: Review the route-only notice scope fix.
execution_order.why_now: The feedback phase should close cleanly before lane 1 moves on to the controller split wave.

guardrails: Keep the new badge and pulse art unchanged for real route-complete moments.
Do not widen the notice copy or add another helper surface.
Add one regression proof for a non-route completion such as Forest Survey staying on the default notice variant.
